titleStmt.title: SII 16.37: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 37. (A.R. No. 516 of 1906.) MUTUKURU, PULIVENDLA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar set up at the entrance into the courtyard of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1415, Pramādi, Chaitra śu. 15, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1493 A.D., April 1.

It records a gift of income derived from sthaḷasuṅkam and other specified taxes, to god Chennakēśava in Muttakūru situated to the south-east of Bhairavakshētra on the Mōhanāchala in Mukti-nāḍu, by Suṅkkayya, brother-in-law of Bokkasam Timmanāyaka on the occasion of the lunar eclipse. Bokkasam Timma-nāyaka is said to have obtained Muktināḍu as nāyaṅkara from Narasā-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayā
bhyu śālivā
hana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1415 Agunēṭiki pramādi
ca saṁvatsara caitra śu 15 sō śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mēdinimīsaru
gaṁḍa kaṭārisāḷuva sāḷuva narasiṁgga
dēvamahārāyala kumāruṁḍu I
ṁmmaḍi narasiṁggadēvamahārāya
lu vijayanagarapaṭṭaṇa
maṁdu sukasaṁggatāvinōdaṁ
buna pṛtivirājyaṁ cēyu
Ā Iṁmmaḍi narasiṁggadēvamahārā
yalku nijabṛtyuṁḍaina narasānāIniṁ
gāru tama baṁṭṭu bokkasaṁ tiṁmā
nāyaniṁgāri maraṁdi suṁkkayya
muttukūri ceṁnna kēsvaradēva
ra divyaśrīpādapadmaṁbula
ku daṁḍḍaṁveṭi Icina dha¨rmmaśāsana
ṁ narasānāyiniṁgāru bokkasaṁ
tiṁmināIniki nāyaṁkkarānaku
pāliṁci navadhariṁcina muktinā
ṭi bhūmilōnu mahāsiddhastānamai
na mōhanācela bhairavakṣētrānaku Ā
gñēyabhāgānanu muttukūriki cellē staḷa
suṁkhaṁ peṁḍlikhaṁḍiguṟaṁ tottu
kolcu Ivimodalaina suṁkhamunu

suṁkaya tama
talli Eṟama
kunu tama taṁḍri
tipināyiniki
ni puṁṇyaṁgā
nu sōmagraha
ṇa puṁṇyakāla
maṁdu staḷasuṁ
khaṁ ceṁnakēsva
radēvuni tiruvā
rādhanaku Āceṁ
drā¨rkastāhigā
nu celaṁgalavi .
yī dha¨rmmānku yevva
ru vighnamairi gāḍi
di mōḍḍa diṁnnavāru
svadattā dviguṇaṁ
puṁṇyaṁ paradattā
nupālanaṁ . parada
ttāpaharēṇa svada
ttaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
svadattātparadattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdha
rā . ṣaṣṭi¨rvaruṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 16.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
